title: IAF Seeks 1,200 Acre Land More in Adilabad for Township, Says Payal Shankar
description: Two IAF officials J.P. Sebharwal, Rahul Shukla and in-charge collector Yuvaraj Marmat, Payal Shankar and the Airport Authority of India (AAI) spoke to media persons on Friday after IAF officials conducted a field-level Obstacle Limitation Survey (OLS).
